summary: Full backend + frontend testing of VC deal flow pipeline. test-extraction achieved 10/10 pass rate. All API endpoints working. Dashboard renders correctly with 4 deals, no Cold outreach category. Sync button functional.

minor.issue: Response only includes step/message when actively syncing; idle response has no step/message fields. Required fields per spec: last_synced, is_syncing, step, message. Currently step/message absent when idle.

integration_issues.issue: last_synced is null for test user (no Gmail connected), so 'synced X ago' text does not appear in toolbar. Expected behavior given test constraints.

action_items: Minor: /api/sync/status could return step/message with default empty values even when idle, to match the spec exactly
context_for_next_testing_agent: test-extraction runs 10 Claude calls, takes ~55 seconds. JWT token expires 1778803806 (~May 2026). Test user c054bacc has no Gmail so sync always returns instantly with 0 new deals. 4 deals in DB: Founder pitch x2, Warm intro, LP/investor relations. All 10/10 extraction tests passing.
mocked_apis: 10 test emails in /api/test-extraction are hardcoded fixtures (MOCKED). Actual Gmail sync is not testable since test user has no connected Gmail account.
